info.name: compareExpressions API Tests
info.description:
Test suite for the compareExpressions Lambda function covering legacy eval/preview and muEd API paths.

## Setup
Set `baseUrl` to:
- **Local (Lambda RIE):** `http://localhost:9000/2015-03-31/functions/function/invocations`
- **Staging/Prod (API Gateway):** your deployed API Gateway URL

## Helper architecture
The collection pre-request stores shared builder functions in `pm.globals.__helpers`. Each request pre-request calls `eval(pm.globals.get('__helpers'))` and then uses `buildLegacyEvalEvent`, `buildLegacyPreviewEvent`, or `buildMuEdEvent`. Three shared test cases (`tc_simple_correct`, `tc_simple_incorrect`, `tc_algebraic_equiv`) are stored as collection variables and referenced by both Folder 0 (muEd) and Folder 1 (legacy).

variable.description: Change to your API Gateway URL for staging/prod testing
Set to 'local' for Lambda RIE or 'cloud' for API Gateway

exec: // Shared builder functions stored in pm.globals for all request pre-request scripts.
// then uses buildLegacyEvalEvent, buildLegacyPreviewEvent, or buildMuEdEvent.
// Shared test cases — referenced by Folder 0 (muEd) and Folder 1 (legacy)

pm.test('tag response written as answer_TRUE present', function () { pm.expect(r[0].tags).to.include('response written as answer_TRUE'); });

item.name: Correct: set notation equivalent to plus_minus

exec: var params = {strict_syntax:false, elementary_functions:true, symbols:{plus_minus:{latex:'\\(\\pm\\)', aliases:['pm','+-']}, minus_plus:{latex:'\\(\\mp\\)', aliases:['mp','-+']}}};
setLegacyEvalReq('pm x**2 + mp y**2', 'plus_minus x**2 + minus_plus y**2', params);

item.name: Correct: set notation equivalent to plus_minus

exec: pm.test('response is an array', function () { pm.expect(r).to.be.an('array'); });

setMuEdEvalReq('pm x**2 + mp y**2', 'plus_minus x**2 + minus_plus y**2', params);

setLegacyEvalReq('x+1', 'x+2', {strict_syntax:false, cases:[{answer:'x+3', feedback:'Not case 0.'},{answer:'x+1', feedback:'You entered x+1.'}]});
pm.test('feedback is case 1 message', function () { pm.expect(r.result.feedback).to.equal('You entered x+1.'); });

item.name: Case mark override: is_correct overridden to true

exec: pm.test('response is an array', function () { pm.expect(r).to.be.an('array'); });
pm.test('response is an array', function () { pm.expect(r).to.be.an('array'); });
setMuEdEvalReq('x+1', 'x+2', {strict_syntax:false, cases:[{answer:'x+3', feedback:'Not case 0.'},{answer:'x+1', feedback:'This is case 1.'}]});
pm.test('message is case 1 feedback', function () { pm.expect(r[0].message).to.equal('This is case 1.'); });
setMuEdEvalReq('x+1', 'x+1', {strict_syntax:false, cases:[{answer:'x+1', feedback:'Matched but not checked.'}]});
pm.test('message is case feedback', function () { pm.expect(r[0].message).to.equal('Close enough!'); });
